}
var staticRenderFns = [function (){var _vm=this,_c=_vm._self._c;return _c('div',{staticClass:"content"},[_c('div',{staticClass:"contentMain"},[_c('div',{staticClass:"element"},[_c('h1',[_vm._v(" Education ")]),_c('div',{staticClass:"card"},[_c('h2',[_vm._v(" Duke University, Durham NC ")]),_c('h3',[_vm._v(" Graduation Year: 2022 ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("  Major: Political Science, Computer Science; Minor: Chinese (你好!)")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("  Relevant Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Web Development, Computer Architecture ")])])]),_c('div',{staticClass:"element"},[_c('h1',[_vm._v(" Work Experience ")]),_c('div',{staticClass:"card"},[_c('h2',[_vm._v(" 314Action - Software Engineering Intern ")]),_c('h3',[_vm._v(" Jan 2022 - April 2022 ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v(" Constructed a comprehensive and adaptive Python/PANDAS script to clean, consolidate, and filter through
                    millions of records to identify STEM professionals who had donated to political campaigns.
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v(" Worked on a full-stack FEC API, with a React and Flask to provide easy access to FEC data. ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v(" Optimized Airtable database, using automation functions to sync data across sheets, saving time in data entry. ")])]),_c('div',{staticClass:"card"},[_c('h2',[_vm._v(" Cal Cunningham Senate Finance Team – Data Science Intern ")]),_c('h3',[_vm._v(" Aug 2020 – Nov 2020 ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Developed web scraper using Python and Selenium to automate and optimize gathering voter information, voter reach-out, and data storage, providing a 200x improvement in efficiency of process.
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Worked in cross-functional team with other campaign workers and North Carolina DNC
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Scaled program to be applicable for other campaigns after NCDP expressed interest in its application.
                ")])]),_c('div',{staticClass:"card"},[_c('h2',[_vm._v(" Global America Business Institute (GABI) – Research Intern ")]),_c('h3',[_vm._v(" June 2019 - Aug 2019 ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Reported on dozens of DC-area environmental and international policy events, pursuant to GABI formats and standards, in a monthly newsletter for submission to subscribers, including energy research institutions in Korea.
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Drafted ~30 summary memos on various energy policy subjects including, nuclear disarmament, US natural gas exports, and the environmental impacts of China’s one belt one road plan. 
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Conducted detailed research to write whitepaper on climate policy and the Green New Deal in the 2020 election.

                    Competed for, and accepted into, competitive Duke Engage service-learning program away from campus.
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Participated in team service projects, one where I weeded, watered, and tilled for a community garden in DC’s 8th ward, and another where I helped to organize, service, and work at a local free food market downtown. 
                ")]),_c('p',[_vm._v("
                    Strengthened my knowledge on political, social, and international affairs by attending talks on a variety of subjects: NC hog farming, NIH cancer research, modern conservatism, local gentrification, etc.
                ")])])]),_c('div',{staticClass:"element"},[_c('h1',[_vm._v(" Research ")]),_c('div',{staticClass:"card"},[_c('h2',[_vm._v(" The Lunar Effect on Delivery and Other Birth Outcomes in Rural Zambia ")]),_c('h3',[_vm._v(" Medical Journal of Zambia, Vol. 44, No. 4: 233-137 (2017). https://www.mjz.co.zm/index.php/mjz/article/view/93/82.")]),_c('p',[_vm._v(" Published paper analyzing birth outcomes in rural Zambia, with BHOMA delivery data and lunar phase data, in the Medical Journal of Zambia ")])])]),_c('div',{staticClass:"element"},[_c('h1',[_vm._v(" Hobbies ")]),_c('p',[_c('b',[_vm._v(" Carpentry ")])]),_c('p',[_c('b',[_vm._v(" Board Sports ")]),_vm._v("(Snow, Skate, Surf)")]),_c('p',[_c('b',[_vm._v(" Chess ")]),_vm._v(" rated 1250 on chess.com ")])])])])
}]
